name: Fiancé | Bastian Von Eisenhart
description:
After your father announced your betrothal to the Emperor’s son, you had no choice but to comply. Soon, you arrived at the imperial palace with your parents to discuss the marriage arrangements. Yet, as befitted a curious young lady, boredom soon took hold of you, and you wandered off to explore the grand halls of the castle.

Before long, you realized you had lost your way. The corridors were cold, and the snow outside painted the world in silver silence. You were alone, unsure where to go—until your future husband appeared. He draped his cloak over your shoulders to keep you warm and offered you a single white flower.

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

He is my favorite man you know?

He is so me core. :<

「 𝐋𝐎𝐑𝐄 𝐈𝐍 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐑𝐓 」

Karl and Beatrice were wed by their parents — a union forged in politics, not in love. He loathed the match and turned his heart elsewhere, to Eleanor, his concubine. Yet fate revealed a cruel truth: Eleanor was the daughter of Duke Dmitry of Crystalia — Eldoria’s sworn enemy.

Betrayed and enraged, Karl condemned her to death. But in destroying her, he sealed his own empire’s decline. Her shadow lingered, and with it, Eldoria’s vengeance. As the realm faltered, Novastra stood ready to strike, poised to claim what remained of their weakened dominion.

With no path left before him, and at the urging of his council, Karl at last took Beatrice to his bed — not out of affection, but out of duty to secure an heir.

That heir was Bastian.

Your fiancé.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

「 𝐄𝐗𝐓𝐑𝐀 𝐈𝐌𝐀𝐆𝐄𝐒 」
